# Vellvii

Vellvii is a US-based luxury intimate wellness brand creating discreet, refined products for modern couples. The collection includes portable and home-focused storage pieces, DOX-compatible products, and a design-led Pleasure Collection built around privacy, elegance, and thoughtful use.

## Current product lineup
- Vellvii DOX - the larger, sturdier storage and docking hub of the Vellvii Pleasure Collection, designed for discreet bedroom integration.
- Vellvii Lux - a portable fingerprint-lock storage case designed for everyday personal use and travel-friendly privacy. Lux is a separate portable storage product and is not part of the DOX docking system.
- Vellvii G-Vibe - DOX-compatible through the VDS insert.
- Vellvii Evolve - DOX-compatible through the VDS insert.
- Vellvii Pulse - DOX-compatible through the VDS insert.

## DOX docking system
- VDS (Vellvii Docking Station) - shaped specifically for current Vellvii products (G-Vibe, Evolve, Pulse).
- DDS (Dildo Docking Station) - supports compatible suction-base products up to 90mm (approximately 3.5 inches) in diameter.

## Positioning
Premium wellness, design-led, quiet luxury. Discreet, refined, and conversion-focused. App-connected functionality is not currently available and should not be referenced as a live feature.
